# Vektor

> A self-hosted documentation platform. Organize knowledge across multiple
> spaces, collaborate in real time with a rich tiptap-based editor, and
> integrate via a REST API or custom extensions. Deploys as a single binary
> with no external dependencies.

This instance exposes its own API and extension documentation over HTTP —
no repository access needed to explore them.

## Docs

- [Documentation overview](/docs): index of all guides below
- [REST API reference](/docs/api): endpoints for spaces, documents, workflows,
  and extensions, mounted under `/api/v1`
- [Extension API](/docs/extensions): manifest format and API surface for
  building extensions that add jobs, tools, and UI

## Notes

- The API accepts session cookies or `Authorization: Bearer at_...` access
  tokens — see `/docs/api` for details.
- `/`, and most other routes, require an authenticated session; the `/docs/*`
  pages above are public and require no authentication.
